description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a wooden frame and black upholstery, designed for both comfort and style. The seat features a tufted pattern, while the backrest is lined with several loose, plush cushions of varying sizes, all in a matching dark color. The armrests are straight, low, and integrated into the wooden frame, providing a clean, minimalist look. The sofa stands on four black, sled-style metal legs that elevate it slightly above the ground, giving it a contemporary urban appeal. The wood grain of the frame contrasts with the sleek, dark upholstery, adding warmth and texture. This piece would fit well in urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern sofa with a wooden frame, black tufted upholstery, and loose cushions, supported by black sled-style metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, tufted seat, and multiple loose black cushions against the backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden armrest and the depth of the seat, with cushions stacked along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of cushions and the wooden armrest, mirroring the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four loose, varied-size back cushions and a single, wide, tufted seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in color and appear plush.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests integrated into the wooden frame, flush with the seat and backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four black sled-style metal legs, positioned at the corners, with a minimalistic, exposed design that slightly elevates the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest lined with loose cushions, medium height, no visible tufting or segmentation on the frame itself.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a tufted pattern on the seat cushion; the back and armrest areas are smooth with no visible decorative stitching.
